sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43415" key="eu)a/ntuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐάντυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, of a chariot, <sense id="n43415.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful rail</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> (but cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐάξων</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
